title: KitchenPerfected 200w Hand Whisk - 5 Speed Selection - Turbo Function - 2 Beater Attachments - 2 Hook Attachments - Eject Button -White - E5433WH
features: 5 SPEED SETTINGS: With 5 speed settings, you are able to select your required speed. Perfect for a wide range of baking.
TURBO FUNCTION & EJECT BUTTON: The turbo allows short bursts of high power mixing, perfect for eggs, meringues and more! Eject button removes the attachments.
2 BEATER ATTACHMENTS: These whisk beaters are perfect for mixing light cake mixtures, batter and creaming ingredients.
2 HOOK ATTACHMENTS: Useful hook attachments mix dough and heavier cake mixes with ease.
200W: The powerful 200w motor mixes, folds and whisks easily whilst making this a durable product.
description: The KitchenPerfected 200w Hand Whisk is perfect for all of your baking needs. With 5 speed settings, you are able to choose a suitable setting and the turbo button provides a quick burst of speed to beat ingredients smoothly. 2 beater and 2 hook attachments make light work of mixing your ingredients together. The beaters can be used to mix things such as light cake mixtures, batters and creaming ingredients, and the hook attachments are perfect for dough and heavier cake mixtures. To remove one set of attachments so you can use the others, simply press the eject button. A powerful 200w engine makes light work of all your mixing. Box Includes: 1 The KitchenPerfected 200w Hand Whisk 2x Whisk Beaters 2x Dough Hooks Instruction Manual
